creator: wollman@csail.mit.edu
text:
>Number:         178605
>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       textproc/augeas is outdated and no longer fetchable
>Confidential:   no
>Severity:       serious
>Priority:       medium
>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>State:          open
>Quarter:        
>Keywords:       
>Date-Required:
>Class:          update
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Arrival-Date:   Tue May 14 00:10:00 UTC 2013
>Closed-Date:
>Last-Modified:
>Originator:     Garrett Wollman
>Release:        FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE-p2 amd64
>Organization:
MIT Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence Lab
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD xyz.csail.mit.edu 9.1-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE-p2 #27 r250065M: Mon Apr 29 17:11:15 EDT 2013 wollman@xyz.csail.mit.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CSAIL amd64

>Description:

The current version of Augeas is 1.0.0, released back in December.
The version that we have is outdated, and because the master site has
been reorganized, the distfile for the old version is no longer
fetchable.  As textproc/augeas is an indirect prerequisite for puppet,
this really should be fixed.

>How-To-Repeat:

	cd /usr/ports/textproc/augeas; make install

>Fix:

The following patch updates the port to 1.0.0.  The client libraries
such as textproc/rubygems-augeas will need updating to match the new
shared library versions.  All tests but one (related to locale) pass.

N.B.: I have made a small change to Shellvars.lns, including '.' as a
valid character in variables, which is required in order to parse
/boot/loader.conf.  However, a different lens (Sysctl.lns or perhaps
Simplevars.lns) should probably be used for this file instead, and the
change should be removed once clients have time to catch up.

diff -ruN augeas010/Makefile augeas/Makefile
--- augeas010/Makefile	2012-11-17 01:01:52.000000000 -0500
+++ augeas/Makefile	2013-05-13 19:23:44.663723286 -0400
@@ -7,10 +7,10 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	augeas
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.0
-PORTREVISION=	5
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+#PORTREVISION=	0
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
-MASTER_SITES=	http://augeas.net/download/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://download.augeas.net/
 
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	A configuration editing tool
diff -ruN augeas010/distinfo augeas/distinfo
--- augeas010/distinfo	2012-02-12 08:17:44.000000000 -0500
+++ augeas/distinfo	2013-05-13 19:24:01.147348074 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (augeas-0.10.0.tar.gz) = ec111af06186216930176ebe5ecccdf7bf528528aee9acde1d5d70088484afca
-SIZE (augeas-0.10.0.tar.gz) = 1676906
+SHA256 (augeas-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 31bf757c5b8197765946b3805f3793c32b03cd92a7a77ec95d37e71a1f131912
+SIZE (augeas-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 1880630
diff -ruN augeas010/files/patch-021ea39f8e augeas/files/patch-021ea39f8e
--- augeas010/files/patch-021ea39f8e	2012-02-12 08:17:44.000000000 -0500
+++ augeas/files/patch-021ea39f8e	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
-diff --git a/src/regexp.c b/src/regexp.c
-index cf0ea5d..811087d 100644
---- src/regexp.c
-+++ src/regexp.c
-@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@
-     ret = fa_restrict_alphabet(r->pattern->str, strlen(r->pattern->str),
-                                &nre, &nre_len, 2, 1);
-     if (ret == 0) {
--        pat = escape(nre, nre_len);
-+        pat = escape(nre, nre_len, RX_ESCAPES);
-         free(nre);
-     }
- #endif
diff -ruN augeas010/files/patch-lenses__puppet.aug augeas/files/patch-lenses__puppet.aug
--- augeas010/files/patch-lenses__puppet.aug	2012-05-16 22:26:16.000000000 -0400
+++ augeas/files/patch-lenses__puppet.aug	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
---- ./lenses/puppet.aug.orig	2012-05-06 13:14:13.000000000 +0100
-+++ ./lenses/puppet.aug	2012-05-06 13:14:45.000000000 +0100
-@@ -38,6 +38,7 @@
-  *************************************************************************)
- let lns     = IniFile.lns record comment
- 
--let filter = (incl "/etc/puppet/puppet.conf")
-+let filter = (incl "/etc/puppet/puppet.conf"
-+             .incl "%%LOCALBASE%%/etc/puppet/puppet.conf")
- 
- let xfm = transform lns filter
diff -ruN augeas010/files/patch-lenses__puppetfileserver.aug augeas/files/patch-lenses__puppetfileserver.aug
--- augeas010/files/patch-lenses__puppetfileserver.aug	2012-05-16 22:26:16.000000000 -0400
+++ augeas/files/patch-lenses__puppetfileserver.aug	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
---- ./lenses/puppetfileserver.aug.orig	2012-05-06 13:14:17.000000000 +0100
-+++ ./lenses/puppetfileserver.aug	2012-05-06 13:15:08.000000000 +0100
-@@ -105,6 +105,7 @@
- let lns = IniFile.lns record comment
- 
- (* Variable: filter *)
--let filter = (incl "/etc/puppet/fileserver.conf")
-+let filter = (incl "/etc/puppet/fileserver.conf"
-+             .incl "%%LOCALBASE%%/etc/puppet/fileserver.conf")
- 
- let xfm = transform lns filter
diff -ruN augeas010/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug
--- augeas010/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug	2012-05-02 21:55:04.000000000 -0400
+++ augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug	2013-05-13 19:34:33.269350187 -0400
@@ -1,12 +1,29 @@
---- lenses/shellvars.aug.orig	2011-11-28 18:51:05.000000000 -0500
-+++ lenses/shellvars.aug	2012-05-02 21:42:02.878164637 -0400
-@@ -196,6 +196,9 @@
+--- lenses/shellvars.aug.orig	2012-12-17 16:39:45.000000000 -0500
++++ lenses/shellvars.aug	2013-05-13 19:34:17.538347901 -0400
+@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
+   let eol = del (/[ \t]+|[ \t]*[;\n]/ . empty_part_re*) "\n"
+   let semicol_eol = del (/[ \t]*[;\n]/ . empty_part_re*) "\n"
+ 
+-  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - "unset" - "export"
++  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_.]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - "unset" - "export"
+   let matching_re = "${!" . key_re . /[\*@]\}/
+   let eq = Util.del_str "="
+ 
+@@ -201,7 +201,8 @@
+   let filter_default = incl "/etc/default/*"
+                      . excl "/etc/default/grub_installdevice*"
+                      . excl "/etc/default/whoopsie"
+-  let filter_misc    = incl "/etc/arno-iptables-firewall/debconf.cfg"
++  let filter_misc    = incl "/boot/loader.conf"
++                     . incl "/etc/arno-iptables-firewall/debconf.cfg"
                       . incl "/etc/cron-apt/config"
                       . incl "/etc/environment"
                       . incl "/etc/blkid.conf"
-+                     . incl "/etc/rc.conf"
+@@ -213,6 +214,7 @@
+                      . incl "/etc/lintianrc"
+                      . incl "/etc/lsb-release"
+                      . incl "/etc/os-release"
 +                     . incl "/etc/periodic.conf"
-+                     . incl "/boot/loader.conf"
- 
-   let filter = filter_sysconfig
-              . filter_ifcfg
+                      . incl "/etc/popularity-contest.conf"
+                      . incl "/etc/rc.conf"
+                      . incl "/etc/selinux/config"
diff -ruN augeas010/files/patch-lenses__sysctl.aug augeas/files/patch-lenses__sysctl.aug
--- augeas010/files/patch-lenses__sysctl.aug	2012-08-29 14:25:20.000000000 -0400
+++ augeas/files/patch-lenses__sysctl.aug	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500

---- lenses/sysctl.aug.orig	2012-08-19 01:11:41.000000000 +0000
-+++ lenses/sysctl.aug	2012-08-19 01:11:57.000000000 +0000
-@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
-   let eol = Util.eol
-   let indent = Util.indent
-   let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+/
--  let eq = del /[ \t]*=[ \t]*/ " = "
-+  let eq = del /[ \t]*=[ \t]*/ "="
-   let value_re = /[^ \t\n](.*[^ \t\n])?/
- 
-   let comment = [ indent . label "#comment" . del /[#;][ \t]*/ "# "
diff -ruN augeas010/files/patch-src-augeas.c augeas/files/patch-src-augeas.c
--- augeas010/files/patch-src-augeas.c	2012-04-24 21:11:34.000000000 -0400
+++ augeas/files/patch-src-augeas.c	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,17 +0,0 @@
-index 6919845..2d0a5bd 100644 (file)
---- src/augeas.c
-+++ src/augeas.c
-@@ -1439,10 +1439,9 @@ int aug_save(struct augeas *aug) {
-         transform_validate(aug, xfm);
- 
-     if (files->dirty) {
--        list_for_each(t, files->children) {
--            if (tree_save(aug, t, AUGEAS_FILES_TREE) == -1)
--                ret = -1;
--        }
-+        if (tree_save(aug, files->children, AUGEAS_FILES_TREE) == -1)
-+            ret = -1;
-+
-         /* Remove files whose entire subtree was removed. */
-         if (meta_files != NULL) {
-             if (unlink_removed_files(aug, files, meta_files) < 0)

- };
- 
-+char *strchrnul(const char *s, int c) {
-+  char *i;
-+  for (i = (char*)s; *i != '\0'; ++i) {
-+    if (*i == c) {
-+      return i;
-+    }
-+  }
-+  return i;
-+}
-+
- int aug_srun(augeas *aug, FILE *out, const char *text) {
-     char *line = NULL;
-     const char *eol;
